# ApiKeyUsed

> Fired from auth middleware when an API key is used, updates lastUsedAt

**Channel:** webhook

## Payload

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| apiKeyId | string | yes | - |

## Published By

- Trigger: `manual`

## Subscriber

- **Handler:** `updateApiKeyLastUsed`
- **Retry:** max 2 attempts (linear)
